text:
# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Welcome to IIT Jammu!

Our campus is spread over 400 acres, at the foothills of the Shivalik range of the Himalayas, at Jagti, a forest area near Jammu City at NH 44.

The first batch of 82 students was admitted in 2016 and started functioning in a nearby temporary campus at Paloura. The operations in the Jagti campus commenced from August 2017. Yes, IIT Jammu is a pioneer among the younger IITs to shift to our permanent campus within the first year of its inception.

Our Jagti campus is well equipped to meet all the basic needs of the students and faculty. From an academic and research perspective, IIT Jammu has 12 academic departments fully equipped with state-of-the-art equipment. From a student's perspective it has modern hostel buildings for girls and boys with fully equipped sports facilities.

IIT Jammu has campus wide ubiquitous **Wi-Fi** and 1 Gbps **internet**connectivity. The institute has a functional e-Governance Solution (**EG/SARAL**) that caters to end-to-end lifecycle of students and employees covering all offices viz Academic Affairs, Student Affairs, Human Resources, R and C, Accounts, and Procurement. The studio-like 40 lecture halls provide a great ambience for learning.

The state-of-the-art High Performance Computing (HPC) facility known as **Agastya**became operational in November 2020 and serves all computing needs. The Central Instrumentation Facility (CIF) known as **Saptarshi**is set up in Paloura campus and houses several high-end research equipment to serve all basic research needs at molecular level. Saptarshi, a center of "Seven labs" is a rare gem in northern India in terms of microscopy and characterization facility that receives samples for testing from several other IITs as well.

Thus, IIT Jammu is all set to provide an all-round learning environment matching the majesty of the Himalayas, and the beauty of Jammu and Kashmir.

**Salient features relevant to prospective students to consider IIT Jammu as an institution of their choice:**

1. **Excellent connectivity**by Rail, Road, and Air - all within 17 KM of radius. Jammu has excellent connectivity compared to several other cities.
2. Jammu is as **safe**as any other city in the country minus pollution. Jammu is the only city to have an IIT, IIM, AIIMS and Central university and it is home to 100+ central govt funded organizations across domains (education, health, defense, banking, culture, tourism, etc.).
3. The **faculty**strength is about 156 as of June 2026 and growing. Around 180+ families of employees **reside on the campus**. IIT Jammu is a very cosmopolitan mini-India and has a **vibrant community culture.**
4. Overall **placements**have increased above 85% and remains encouraging with many students going for higher education in leading international and national institutions. More details can be obtained from Career Development Services
5. Students are going for national and international **internships**of up to six months under various MoUs that include organizations in Europe, Asia, Australia, etc. Many of them also receive support ranging from 0.5 - 2 Lakh under different scholarships and incentive schemes.
6. Students have many **career development** and **professional skill advancement opportunities** such as Workshops, Leadership Conclave, Industry Conclave, Udyamitsav, etc. organized enthusiastically by Institute and Student Body.
7. There are specified entrepreneurial, research & innovation activities being made available to students early in their program under the inhouse platforms of Tinkering Lab, I2EDC, I3C (a section 8 company, incubetor), etc. IIT Jammu has created a state-of-the-art Tinkering Lab with MBF and UPL generous endowments. I3C Company Portfolio is available at: i3c-iitjammu.in/portfolio/
8. Students enjoy **top of the line GYM**activities and **Sports training** in various inhouse sports facilities. They have been receiving prizes in Inter-IIT Sports meet, etc. Here, sports become an essential part of life for many.
9. Students are also participating actively in other national and international **competitions**, in areas of Coding, SAE-BAJA, Hackathons, etc.
10. Students are very actively engaged in various Society Give-back & Ek Bharat Shrestha Bharat activities under its well-recognized “**Kritash**” Club. This club also organizes joint events with other similar bodies Pan-India.

## NIRF Ranking – IIT Jammu

IIT Jammu is ranked **56th in Engineering** as per the **National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2026**, published by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. This ranking reflects the institute's growing academic reputation, research output, and student outcomes.

| Category | NIRF Rank (2026) |
|---|---|
| Engineering | 56 |

NIRF rankings are based on five key parameters: Teaching, Learning & Resources (TLR), Research and Professional Practice (RP), Graduation Outcomes (GO), Outreach and Inclusivity (OI), and Perception (PR).

More details: https://www.nirfindia.org/
